name: What proof do I need for a silicosis claim from cutting stone at work?
description: Doctor diagnosis, work records, exposure evidence, witness statements.

mainEntity.name: What proof do I need for a silicosis claim from cutting stone at work?

acceptedAnswer.text: Doctor diagnosis, work records, exposure evidence, witness statements.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Medical diagnosis via spirometry/CT, plus exposure history like job logs or air samples.** Evidence links silica dust to lung scarring when employers skip dust controls[4][5]. Key factors: Coworker affidavits, PPE records, safety violation reports; biopsy for acute cases. In Utah fabrication shops, Cal/OSHA-like enforcement aids. Photograph dusty conditions, request employer monitoring data now. Expert testimony often seals causation.
